epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; imaging reserved for atypical cases; conservative management is standard

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with physiotherapy access

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Stretching, orthotics, activity modification, physiotherapy; injections selectively
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for physiotherapy in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong conservative care pathways and access to rehab in many member states
